rootFurther.intro:
Facing the storm-like changes of the AI era and ever-increasing demands from clients, Sun* has chosen a strategy of diversifying capabilities — not just striving to be an elite in its field, but aiming higher, where every Sunner is a "problem-solver" — an expert in tackling any challenge, finding solutions for every project, client, and society.
Inspired by diverse capabilities, flexible development, and the spirit of digging deep to break through in the AI era, "Root Further" was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025.
Beyond its surface meaning, "Root Further" represents our journey of constantly reaching further, rooting deeper, touching the hidden "geological layers" to continue existing, rising, and nurturing the passion for value creation that burns bright in every Sun* member.
rootFurther.quote: "A tree with deep roots fears no storm"
rootFurther.conclusion:
Before the storm, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization with individuals who are confident in their diverse capabilities, ready to create and embrace challenges, and take charge of change — that is an organization that not only stands firm through turbulence but also leverages every advantage to conquer the challenges of our time.
No one knows what hidden "geological layers" lie deep within the technology industry and modern markets. What we do know is that when "Root Further" becomes our rooted spirit, we will not fear — instead, we will feel excited about any uncharted territory on the journey ahead. Because we always believe that within those infinite horizons, extraordinary wonders and opportunities await us.

kudos.label: Recognition Movement
kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.description:
NEW IN SAA 2025
The activity of recognizing and thanking colleagues — held for the first time for all Sunners. Deployed in November 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and thanks through the organizer's system. This will serve as material for the Heads Council when selecting award recipients.
